creator: cy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Can you:

tar cJf /tmp/devd.tar.xz /etc/devd*

and upload the tarball to this PR? Or, if you feel more comfortable to send me the tarball instead, that will work too.

When I tried to reproduce your lagg issue in #10 I could not. It worked as expected. Additionally, I normally remove members of lagg when testing in VMs and on another machine, also working as expected. This leads me down the path that the answer must be there.
